specific_mechanism: Two separated inert reactant chambers + valve + catalyst → on-demand exothermic mixed expulsion.
llm_application: BOMBARDIER-LLM: two precomputed inert buffers (canned counter-prompts + canned safety completions); low-cost classifier-gate detects attack class; catalytic mixer combines buffers into a per-attack-class counter-response at low latency.
novelty_claim: ADO (2604.20932), PromptGuard (2025), multi-agent defense (2509.14285) cover defense orchestration. Combination of two pre-stored inert reactant buffers + classifier-catalyst mix is closer to a stored-counter-template lookup than a runtime generative defense.
